full_text:
Zhong Yu (Zhishu) 鍾毓 (稚叔)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhong Yu (鍾毓), styledZhishu (稚叔). A senior law officer, warned Sima Zhao about his brother’s untrustworthy nature. Zhong Yu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Zhong Yu lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
